Added_Other.mechanism: Optimizes how draw calls are tracked for rendering.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves game performance by making graphics rendering more efficient.

Added_Other.name: FFlagSlimFileMeshInstanceSupport

Added_Other.purpose: Reduces loading times and improves performance for 3D models in games.

Added_Other.name: FFlagSlimFixCsgColor3
Added_Other.mechanism: Refines color handling in 3D models.
Added_Other.purpose: Provides better color accuracy and visual fidelity in game objects.

Added_Other.name: FFlagSlimFixDecalUvRange
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the UV mapping for decals to improve their appearance.
Added_Other.purpose: Enhances the visual quality of decals on surfaces, making them look better.

Added_Other.name: FFlagSlimFixExtents
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the bounding box calculations for slim characters.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves collision detection for slim avatars, making gameplay more accurate.

Added_Other.name: FFlagSlimFixFileMeshScale
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts how file meshes are scaled in the rendering engine.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures that 3D models appear correctly sized in the game, enhancing visual consistency.

Added_Other.name: FFlagSlimFixInstanceUvOffset
Added_Other.mechanism: Fixes UV offset issues in instances to improve rendering.
Added_Other.purpose: Provides better visual quality in games by correcting texture placements.

Added_Other.name: FFlagSlimFixMaterialService
Added_Other.mechanism: Refines the material service for better handling of materials.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures smoother graphics and better visual quality in games.

Added_Other.name: FFlagSlimFixMeshColor
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the way colors are applied to 3D models in the game.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures more accurate and visually appealing colors for game assets.

Added_Other.name: FFlagSlimFixSpecialFileMeshColor
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the color handling for specific mesh files to ensure consistency.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures that special meshes appear correctly colored in the game.

Added_Other.name: FFlagSlimFixSpecialMeshScaling
Added_Other.mechanism: Corrects scaling issues with special mesh objects in games.
Added_Other.purpose: Players enjoy better visual quality and consistency with special mesh items in their games.

Added_Other.name: FFlagSlimInvalidatePartiallyStreamedModelInstances
Added_Other.mechanism: Improves the way partially loaded models are handled in the game.
Added_Other.purpose: Reduces errors and improves performance when streaming models.

Added_Other.name: FFlagSlimSpecialMeshHeadSupport
Added_Other.mechanism: Provides support for a more lightweight version of special mesh heads.
Added_Other.purpose: Reduces resource usage and improves performance for players using special heads.

Added_Other.name: FFlagSlimSpecialMeshPlastic
Added_Other.mechanism: Changes the rendering method for special mesh objects to use a more efficient plastic material.
Added_Other.purpose: Enhances the visual quality and performance of special mesh items.

Added_Other.name: FFlagSlimSpecialMeshPlastic2
Added_Other.mechanism: Introduces a new version of special mesh materials with optimized properties.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves visual quality and performance of plastic materials in games.

Added_Other.name: FFlagSlimTranscoderDecalTransparency
Added_Other.mechanism: Improves how decal transparency is processed in the game engine.
Added_Other.purpose: Allows for better visual effects with transparent decals, enhancing the overall graphics.

Added_Other.name: FFlagSlimTranscoderDontTransformFileMeshUV
Added_Other.mechanism: Prevents the automatic alteration of UV mapping for file meshes during processing.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures that the appearance of 3D models remains consistent and as intended by the creators.

Added_Other.name: FFlagSlimTranscoderFixCSGMaterial
Added_Other.mechanism: Fixes issues with how materials are processed in complex shapes.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures better visual quality for games using complex geometry.

Added_Other.name: FFlagSlimTranscoderFixMeshUVs
Added_Other.mechanism: Fixes issues with UV mapping on 3D meshes during the transcoding process.
Added_Other.purpose: Enhances the visual quality of 3D models for players, making them look better in-game.

Added_Other.name: FFlagSlimTranscoderGenerateParts3
Added_Other.mechanism: Enables a new way to create parts using slim transcoding techniques.
Added_Other.purpose: Allows for more efficient and flexible part creation in game development.

Added_Other.name: FFlagSlimTranscoderOnlyUseScale
Added_Other.mechanism: Optimizes video transcoding by only using scale settings.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves video quality and performance in games that use video streaming.

Added_Other.name: FFlagSlimTranscoderResetColorForDecals
Added_Other.mechanism: Allows decals to reset their color settings when processed by the slim transcoder.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures that decals appear correctly with their intended colors in the game.

Added_Other.name: FFlagSlimTranscoderSanitizeAssetID3

Added_Other.purpose: Ensures smoother asset handling and reduces errors in games.

Added_Other.name: FFlagSlimTranscoderTrussSupport

Added_Other.purpose: Improves the stability and appearance of slim truss models in games.

Added_Other.name: FFlagSlimUseFloatColor

Added_Other.name: FFlagSlimUseUnifiedSpecialMeshFunction

Removed_Other.purpose: Improves the speed and accuracy of item searches in the marketplace.

Removed_Other.name: FFlagFindNextActionContext_Staged
Removed_Other.mechanism: Enables a new method for determining the next action context in the game engine.
Removed_Other.purpose: Improves the responsiveness and fluidity of gameplay by allowing smoother transitions between actions.

Removed_World.name: FFlagFmodFixSemaphores_Staged
Removed_World.mechanism: Fixes issues with semaphore handling in the FMOD audio engine.
Removed_World.purpose: Improves audio performance and reliability in games.

Added_Other.name: FFlagEnableAdsCtaRefactor_Staged
Added_Other.mechanism: Updates the way ads are displayed and interacted with in the game.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves user engagement with ads, making them more effective and appealing.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Stores the dynamic string of the current Git hash for version tracking.
Changed_Other.purpose: Helps developers ensure players are using the latest version of the game.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Modifies how dynamic strings handle timestamps.
Changed_Other.purpose: Allows for more accurate and flexible time displays in games, enhancing user experience.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Utilizes a fast string representation of the repository's Git hash.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves performance and efficiency in version tracking for developers.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlipTimeStampFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Improves the speed of string handling for timestamps in the game.
Changed_Other.purpose: Reduces lag and enhances performance when displaying time-related information.

Added_Camera/UI.purpose: Enhances user experience by allowing players to interact without interruptions.

Added_Other.mechanism: Removes unnecessary text from buttons in the user interface.
Added_Other.purpose: Simplifies the interface, making it easier for players to understand and use.
